item.title: Ukraine strikes Tuapse oil refinery again, General Staff vows 'systematic' strikes on...

item.title: Germany's Most-Wanted Woman Gets 13 Years - Newser
item.description: Germany's Most-Wanted Woman Gets 13 Years  NewserSuspected former member of German left-wing militant group jailed after years on the run  CNNGermany’s most wanted woman jailed after three decades evading police  The GuardianGerman ex-Red Army Faction militant Daniela Klette jailed for armed robberies after years on the run  BBCAfter Decades on the Run, a Leftist Militant Is Sentenced in Germany  The New York Times

item.title: Very Low-IQ Trump Too Stoopid to Win War - The Bulwark
item.description: Very Low-IQ Trump Too Stoopid to Win War  The BulwarkTrump’s ambush diplomacy comes with long-term costs  The HillWhen ‘Trump says ...’ maybe isn’t newsworthy  The Christian Science MonitorTrump doesn't understand 21st-century warfare — and it cost America dearly  Alternet[Brahma Chellaney] Cost of Trump's crony diplomacy  The Korea Herald
